Worklamp_Directional.description: A basic lamp for illuminating a large area.

Rug_Deer.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Deer_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Deer_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Deer.
Deer_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dehumidifier.description: Powerful, portable protection against the effects of being underground.
Dehumidifier.flavorText: Powered by charcoal, the dehumidifier heavily reduces bacterial growth in caves by reducing dampness.

Faction_Mission_Tech1.description: Element from an experimental Larkwell Martinez device.
Faction_Mission_Tech1.flavorText: Some sort of signal or force transmitter.

Faction_Mission_Tech2.description: Element from an experimental Larkwell Martinez device.

Faction_Mission_Tech3.description: Element from an experimental Larkwell Martinez device.

Meta_Module_Poison_Resistance.description: Releases a steady micro dose of antivenom, enhancing poison resistance.
Meta_Module_Poison_Resistance.flavorText: The Detoxifier is classified under UDA regulations as technically qualifying users as a cyborg.

Meta_Module_Consumption.description: Micro-doses the user with a high-potency enzyme supplement to reduce food, water and oxygen consumption.
Meta_Module_Consumption.flavorText: "Like terraforming for your body." - Anonymous Group 15 researcher

Mission_Thruster_Part.description: The remains of what was a Ship Thruster.
Mission_Thruster_Part.flavorText: Can be repaired on a Machining Bench

Mission_Navigation_Part.description: A few electrical parts with frayed wires.
Mission_Navigation_Part.flavorText: Can be repaired on a Machining Bench

Drying_Rack.description: A rack for slowly drying various cuts of meat and curing leather.

Giant_Steak_Dried.description: A large dried piece of meat

Gamey_Meat_Dried.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Soft_Meat_Dried.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Stringy_Meat_Dried.description: A plain piece of dried meat

White_Meat_Dried.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Scanner_DeepOre.description: A scanner that can locate various deep ore deposits within the surrounding area
Scanner_DeepOre.flavorText: A truly remarkable piece of equipment.

Mission_Gyro_Broken.description: This instrument has been damaged almost beyond repair.
Mission_Gyro_Broken.flavorText: What could have broken this so badly?

Rustic_Decoration_Bench.description: A bench for crafting decorations from a range of tech levels.
Rustic_Decoration_Bench.flavorText: Pick up a new hobby, today!

Mission_Digested_Biomatter_Sample.description: A sample taken from a contaminated bear.
Mission_Digested_Biomatter_Sample.flavorText: Its essentially some kind of Acid

Mission_Damaged_Bioweapon_Sample.description: A damaged bio-weapon, it seems to be leaking.
Mission_Damaged_Bioweapon_Sample.flavorText: Probably get rid of this ASAP

Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_1.description: A Strange Audio log taken from a prospectors suit.

Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_2.description: A Strange Audio log taken from a prospectors suit.

Deep_Freeze.description: A freezer that preserves food but amasses ice very slowly and uses a fairly large amount of power.
Deep_Freeze.flavorText: Energy efficiency is important on EVERY planet.

Dogtags_Lure.description: A flashy lure carefully crafted out of... dogtags?
Dogtags_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Dried_Tomato.description: A snack with an intense sweet and savory flavor
Dried_Tomato.flavorText: Another great snack from your Drying Rack.

Dried_Avocado.description: A snack with a chewy texture and concentrated flavor
Dried_Avocado.flavorText: Another great snack from your Drying Rack.

Dried_Rhubarb.description: A healthy snack with a rather tart flavor.
Dried_Rhubarb.flavorText: Another great snack from your Drying Rack.

Dried_Freshwater_Fillet.description: A savory snack made by drying and preserving tender fillets of freshwater fish.
Dried_Freshwater_Fillet.flavorText: Can be dried using a Drying Rack. Rather chewy.

Dried_Saltwater_Fillet.description: A flavorful snack made by drying and preserving tender fillets of saltwater fish.
Dried_Saltwater_Fillet.flavorText: Can be dried using a Drying Rack. Rather chewy.

Refined_Iron_Wood.description: A distilled essence of the Miasma that can be found on creatures in heavily exotic-affected areas.
Refined_Iron_Wood.flavorText: Exotics have been shown to warp and twist DNA on a molecular level, it would seem no living thing is safe.

AlienFossil_Conch.description: A decorated conch shell etched with strange markings.

Drac_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Drac.
Drac_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dreadwing_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Dreadwing.
Dreadwing_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Drac_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Dreadwing_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Scorpion.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist with surviving a wildlife attack.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Scorpion.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Saddle_DeluxeLeather.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount made from supple leather.

Saddle_Desert.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount for the harsh Desert conditions.

Dog_Bowl_Food.description: A simple bowl to fill with food for your dog.
Dog_Bowl_Food.flavorText: Wasn\'t this full a minute ago?

Dog_Bowl_Water.description: A simple bowl to fill with water for your dog.
Dog_Bowl_Water.flavorText: A hydrated pet is a happy pet.

Food_Animal_Feed_Squash.description: A feed that will help animals survive desert environments.

Dirt_Frame.description: A simple block of dirt that can serve as the foundation of a structure. Must be placed attached to the terrain.

Dirt_Ramp.description: A simple dirt ramp that can serve as basic vertical travesal. Must be placed attached to the terrain.

Dirt_Mound.description: A place to plant crops.  Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Dirt_Mound.flavorText: Dig (RMB) with a shovel to create. Higher tier shovels create better dirt mounds.

Dirt.description: Some rich Icarus soil extracted from the ground with a shovel.

Dirt_Corner.description: A simple corner to help with foundation building.

Dried_Kiwifruit.description: Sliced and dried kiwifruit, good for a quick snack.

Dirt_Mound_With_Tier.description: A place to plant crops.  Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Dirt_Mound_With_Tier.flavorText: Dig (RMB) with a shovel to create. Higher tier shovels create better dirt mounds.

Mini_Hippo_Trophy.description: Three mounted Dribbos, mounted for all to see.
Mini_Hippo_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Mini_Hippo_Head.description: A preserved memory of a unique creature.
Mini_Hippo_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Bunker_Antenna.description: A non-functional antenna which was previously used in a communications network.
Bunker_Antenna.flavorText: Storms on Icarus can do some damage.

Bunker_Aircon.description: An old Air conditioning unit that is past its prime.

Bunker_Prop.description: Equipment that was once used for something important.

Bunker_SolarPanel.description: Once a fully functioning solar panel.
Bunker_SolarPanel.flavorText: Handy if it could be repaired

Saddle_Basic_Desert.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable
Saddle_Basic_Desert.flavorText: Feel the wind in your hair.

Dirt_Stack_50.description: Some rich Icarus soil extracted from the ground with a shovel.

Prop_Pipe2.description: Pipes that carry all sorts of wires and electrical elements.

Mission_DNA_Supernatant.description: Result of Separating components of a Lysate solution.

Mission_DNA_Pellet.description: The Result of Separating Precipitated DNA in a Centrifuge.

Dead_Ape.flavorText: There is always a bigger fish.
